zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de St. Amand於大約1200年出生在英國奧可福爾布洛哈姆時，他的父親Amauri de St. Amand26歲，母親Iseult Pantulf31歲。他和Asceline d'Aubigny至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1245年7月28日在英國英格蘭哈普爾武坡 可拉特福德享年46歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: St.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: 1  French: habitational name from any of the places so called, for example in Normandy, named from a religious dedication to a (male) St. Clair.
2  North American variant spelling of   St  .   Claire  .

variants.name: Claire
meanings: Variant of   Clair  , an altered form of German   Klare  .

variants.name: St
meanings: Americanized spelling of French   St  .   Denis  .

nameMeanings.name: Amand
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Walloon, and in some cases possibly also English (of Norman origin), Dutch, or Flemish: from the Old French personal name Amand, Amant, Latin amandus ‘suitable to be loved’, the name of a 5th-century bishop of Bordeaux and several other Christian saints. In England it was also used as a female personal name.

variants.name: Ament
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Amand  .
Hungarian (Áment): probably of German origin (see 2 above). The surname Ament, presumably of Hungarian origin, is also found in Croatia.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de St. Amand was born about 1200, in Bloxham, Oxfordshire, England, his father, Amauri de St. Amand, was 26 and his mother, Iseult Pantulf, was 31. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Asceline d'Aubigny. He died about 28 July 1245, in Upper Clatford, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46.

Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Asceline d'Aubigny. Il est décédé environ 28 juillet 1245, à Upper Clatford, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de St. Amandが約1200年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアブロクスハムで生まれた時，父Amauri de St. Amandは26歳，母Iseult Pantulfは31歳であった。彼はAsceline d'Aubignyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1245年7月28日にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアウップエル クラトフォードで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de St. Amand(이)가 대략 1200년 영국 스퍼드실르 블로스함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Amauri de St. Amand(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Iseult Pantulf(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Asceline d'Aubigny(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1245년 7월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 업퍼 클라트퍼드에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de St. Amand родился около 1200 г. в местности блоксхам, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Amauri de St. Amand было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Iseult Pantulf, 31.
